title: tragacantha exscapa
intro: Tragacantha exscapa, also known as the needle thistle or prickly thistle, is a plant species with thistle-like flowers and prickly leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Tragacantha exscapa is said to have various health benefits, including relieving symptoms of arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
